title: PATMAP
description:
Dedicated controller developed in OpenFrameworks on iPap to allow the people to select an animated pattern and a color for each face of the sculpture and name their preset
	                          / Design of an Arduino shield to collect inputs from an array of piezzos placed within the structure
	                          / Dedicated software to create the interactive grids of patterns from the visitos' input on the Ipad and the Arduino in MaxMSP-Jitter
	                          / Calibration of the video mapping on the two projectors in MadMapper
